name: Spinach Enchiladas with Three Colors
recipeIngredient: 1 bunch Cilantro, chopped or 1 bunch Chives, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the stuffing: Combine cottage cheese and cream cheese in a food processor and blend until smooth. Add the remaining ingredients (cumin powder, chili powder, thawed spinach) and stir into the cheese mixture.
2. Prepare the red sauce: If using any red chili sauce recipe, wash chilies and remove seeds unless you want it very hot. Boil water in a saucepan. Add chilies and turn off heat; let soak. Melt butter in a frying pan, add onions and garlic, and saute until clear. Set aside.
3. Process the chilies, water, and cornstarch to make a smooth sauce. Add flour to the butter mixture to form a roux. Combine chili with liquid to create a sauce; you may need to add water or a small can of tomato sauce. Simmer until thickened, stirring constantly. Set aside.
4. Prepare the green sauce: Simmer tomatillos in water until tender, then process and blend. Saute onions and garlic in oil or butter, then add to tomatillos.
5. Dip tortillas in red sauce while simmering to soften them. Fill with a dollop of cheese and spinach mixture, roll, and place seam side down in a glass casserole sprayed with pan spray.
6. Cover with red sauce.
7. Add green sauce (tomatillo sauce).
8. Dollops of sour cream can be added on top.
Serves 8.
Emilie rwsm05a
